title: Document optimization workflow runner + assessment bundle interpretation (public docs + operator runbook)
description:
## Summary
Document the optimization workflow runner and candidate assessment bundle so operators and future agents can execute and interpret the process consistently.

## Deliverables
- Public docs for staged workflow (deterministic check, random n=50 loop, random n=200 hard gate).
- Operator runbook for running, monitoring, and validating bundle-backed assessments.
- Guidance for interpreting decision outputs (accept/reject/inconclusive) and malfunction-routing recommendations.
- Clear references to bundle attachment contract and compact summary fields.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting docs slice: document staged workflow runner (deterministic + random 50 + random 200 gate), bundle attachment/summary contract, and interpretation of policy/workflow decisions and generalization metrics.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented public docs updates for workflow operationalization. Updated evaluate-score method docs with explicit 50/200 staged runbook, canonical bundle content, and attachment+compact-summary persistence model. Updated associated-datasets concept docs to explain Stage A/B/C role and how associated datasets fit generalization workflow decisions.
